# enableStreams()

**Instance Method**

Enables streams for the pipe.

## Declaration

```swift
func enableStreams() throws
```

## Discussion

This method changes the operational mode of the pipe to allow streaming endpoint transfers. Call this method before [doc://com.apple.iousbhost/documentation/IOUSBHost/IOUSBHostPipe/copyStream(withStreamID:)].

## Managing Streams

- **copyStream(withStreamID:)**: Returns the stream for a stream ID.
- **disableStreams()**: Disables streams for the pipe.
